raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year> I called my credit card company Barclay XXXX XXXX Mastercard to place a hold on an authorized user XXXX XXXX and on XX/XX/year> the credit card company authorized XXXX XXXX to make a charge on my account in the amount of {$3400.00}. When I called the credit card company on XX/XX/year> they acknowledge that there is a record of a phone conversation between myself and a representative on XX/XX/year> but claim that there are no records and no request of a credit card hold. I have requested a dispute of the charge with no results and I have requested to speak with a manger and have yet to receive a phone call. 

I am a consumer who needs assistance. I feel that the credit card company is committing a fraudulent action against me. If this is not the appropriate agency, please guide me to the federal agency that can help me or if you can forward me claim to them, I would greatly appreciate any help that you can provide me.
